# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant the account 'roles/owner' at project level so it can manage all GCP resources without permission errors. This enables full automation of our infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- name: ci-cd-pipeline-service-account
  type: gcp-types/iam-v1:projects.serviceAccounts
  properties:
    accountId: ci-cd-pipeline-sa
    displayName: Service Account for CI/CD Pipeline
    description: This service account is used by the CI/CD pipeline for automated infrastructure deployments.
- name: ci-cd-pipeline-sa-owner-binding
  type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:projects.setIamPolicy
  properties:
    resource: $(project())
    policy:
      bindings:
      - role: roles/owner
        members:
        - serviceAccount:$(ref.ci-cd-pipeline-service-account.email)

outputs:
- name: serviceAccountEmail
  value: $(ref.ci-cd-pipeline-service-account.email)
- name: serviceAccountId
  value: $(ref.ci-cd-pipeline-service-account.uniqueId)
